title: lobelia borneensis subsp. borneensis
intro: Lobelia borneensis subsp. borneensis, also known as Borneo lobelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, reducing pain and swelling, and fighting infections. The plant's health benefits include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory function, and act as an expectorant to help relieve congestion and coughs. Herbal preparations of Lobelia borneensis subsp. borneensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
